      │                                                                  │
      │  Add member · step 1/3                                           │
      │                                                                  │
      │  Name (slug, e.g. alice):                                        │
      │                                                                  │
      │  > type a message, Enter to send, Ctrl-C to quit                 │
      │                                                                  │
      │  welcome — let's add your first member   [Esc: cancel]           │
      │                                                                  │
      └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
